A

Antics - Class in Unnamed Package
Lab 2: String Antics This class has methods to check words and sentences: - palindrome (same forward/backward) - abecedarian (letters in A to Z order) - pangram (has all 26 letters) - capitalizeFirstLetter
Antics() - Constructor for class Antics
 

C

capitalizeFirstLetter(String) - Static method in class Antics
Makes only the first letter uppercase.

I

isAbecedarian(String) - Static method in class Antics
Checks if a word is abecedarian (letters in A to Z order).
isPalindrome(String) - Static method in class Antics
Checks if a string is a palindrome.
isPangram(String) - Static method in class Antics
Checks if a sentence is a pangram (has all 26 letters a to z).
